questions.question: Explain the exploration-exploitation dilemma in reinforcement learning with an example.
expectedPoints: Definition of exploitation (using known good actions)
Trade-off between short-term and long-term rewards

questions.question: Compare and contrast Q-learning and SARSA algorithms.
Describe the components of a Markov Decision Process and explain the Markov property.
expectedPoints: Five components: states, actions, transition probabilities, reward function, discount factor
Example of Markov vs non-Markov states

questions.question: Explain the credit assignment problem in reinforcement learning and its challenges.
Discuss the main challenges in reinforcement learning and potential solutions.
expectedPoints: Curse of dimensionality and function approximation
Delayed rewards and temporal credit assignment

questions.question: Formulate a real-world problem as a Markov Decision Process and explain each component.
expectedPoints: Problem description (e.g., robot navigation, game playing)
